checked_dimensions.name: spec_compliance
checked_dimensions.evidence: The implementation adds specbridge-standard-readiness, a standard readiness artifact, artifact inventory family coverage, documentation, dashboards, final report, audit packet, and audit evidence under issue-228 scope.

checked_dimensions.name: acceptance_criteria
checked_dimensions.evidence: CLI coverage validates command shape, stable read-only output, required fields, readiness enum, recommended action enum, cleanup/enforcement posture, no-runtime/no-secret boundaries, MCP read-only posture, output path behavior, force behavior, bad path behavior, and standard_readiness artifact family coverage.

checked_dimensions.name: policy_boundaries
checked_dimensions.evidence: The command does not call the network, mutate GitHub, launch Claude Code, launch Codex, read secrets, change billing, change CI/CD security, enforce cleanup, enforce retention, or deploy. Work stayed inside the issue-228 allowed scope.

checked_dimensions.name: security_rules
checked_dimensions.evidence: The readiness output records explicit false boundary flags for runtime launches, network, GitHub mutation, secret access, billing, CI/CD security changes, and deployment, with cleanup_permission and retention_enforcement both none.

checked_dimensions.name: changed_file_scope
checked_dimensions.evidence: Changed files are declared in the issue-228 contract and scope manifest, including CLI, tests, docs, dashboards, artifacts, and evidence files.

checked_dimensions.name: test_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: validate-contracts, validate-contract-scopes, test-specbridge-cli, validate-final-reports, validate-audit-packets, validate-chatgpt-audits, specbridge-smoke, and git diff --check passed locally.

checked_dimensions.name: ci_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: CI is recorded as not_collected in the audit packet because the PR has not been opened yet. Final policy merge remains blocked until GitHub Actions pass on the PR.

checked_dimensions.name: final_report_honesty
checked_dimensions.evidence: The final report records local validation status, pending PR/CI state, deployment not applicable, and unresolved risks about CI collection and cleanup/retention remaining blocked.

findings.evidence: The task is locally complete but GitHub Actions cannot be recorded before the PR exists.
findings.recommendation: Open the PR and collect CI before merge.

unresolved_risks: GitHub Actions CI has not been collected until the PR is opened.
The command reports existing branch/artifact debt but intentionally does not authorize cleanup or retention enforcement.
